D8 AnthropologyL3 ApplyReference

Indigo Air-Oxidation Timeline — Yellow Cloth Turns Blue

Cloth lifted from a leuco vat starts yellow-green; over ~30 s of exposure to atmospheric O₂, the dye trapped in the fibre converts back to insoluble indigotin blue

The colour change after the vat is the famous "indigo moment" — dyers traditionally chant or count seconds while the cloth hits air. Multiple dips (each ~3 min vat + 30 s oxidation) build saturation; Japanese ai-zome layers 30+ dips for the deepest blues.

Scrub time after lifting from vat.
